source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane Other Lifting

actions_taken: PIC blocked off area with portable metal stand
PIC used red flagging tape and steel cables to prevent entry
Injured person transported via helicopter to Grand Isle Shore Base
Platform production shut in by BSEE investigator
Fire water pump placed out of service
Cox created task force to identify serious corrosion issues
event.summary: On 08 September 2020 at 1330 hours, a contract mechanic fell through corroded steel bar deck grating on Cox Operating LLC's South Pass 49 Platform A while walking near the fire water pump to retrieve a serial number. The grating, secured only with clips and not welded, gave way beneath the mechanic, creating an open hole. The mechanic fell chest deep but caught himself and pulled to safety. Initial injury assessment reported bruises to the upper left rib area, but subsequent medical evaluation revealed a meniscus tear in the left knee requiring surgery, resulting in a lost time accident greater than 3 days. Investigation revealed extensive corrosion of deck grating throughout the platform, with prior BSEE inspections having documented corrosion issues that had not been adequately addressed by the operator.
recommendations: District Field Operations should develop detailed inspection standards for deck inspections
key_phrases: deck grating secured with clips not welded

hazards.name: Hazardous work environment with open holes

threats.name: Grating structural failure due to corrosion
Grating clips failure allowing grating to slip
Personnel stepping on unsecured or corroded grating

consequences.name: Potential fatality if personnel not able to self-rescue

controls.name: Grating clips securing deck grating
controls.barrier_role: Prevent grating from shifting or falling

supporting_text: The section of grating where the mechanic fell through was secured with grating clips and was not welded in place
Cox did not properly maintain the clips that held the decking in place
When the contract mechanic stepped on the grating, the grating shifted causing it to slip off the beam and fall to the water below

controls.name: Welding of deck grating to structural supports
controls.barrier_role: Prevent grating from flipping or shifting when clips fail

supporting_text: The section of grating was said to be secured with grating clips and was not welded in place
Cox did not properly install grating such that the length of grating crossed several steel supports to prevent the deck from flipping up when the clips or welds failed

controls.name: Preventive maintenance program for deck grating
controls.barrier_role: Identify and address corrosion before structural failure

supporting_text: Equipment Failure - Inadequate preventive maintenance: Evidence shows localized corrosion on the beam of the 24" x 36" deck grating that fell in the water below created a hole where the injured person fell halfway through
Cox did not properly maintain the clips that held the decking in place
Cox failed to perform adequate general maintenance of the deck as several other areas of concern were identified in the investigation and follow-up inspections

controls.name: BSEE Level-1 structural inspection and corrosion assessment

supporting_text: The Level-1 inspection dated 25 May 2019, submitted to the BSEE Office of Structural and Technical Support, indicates Coating on the production steel bar deck grating is in moderate condition with moderate to heavy surface corrosion and scale covering approximately 10% of the surface
The Level-1 report identified areas of concern that Cox had not addressed
However, the area where the mechanic fell through was not listed as one of the areas to be addressed

controls.name: BSEE Incident of Non-Compliance (INC) issuance for corrosion
controls.barrier_role: Enforce corrective action for identified corrosion hazards

supporting_text: On 11 September 2020, the AI issued a G-111 (Component Shut-in) Incident of Non-Compliance (INC) for the steel bar deck grating corrosion in the area of the open hole, in addition to areas surrounding the open hole near process vessels

controls.name: Area barricading and warning systems
controls.barrier_role: Prevent personnel access to hazardous open hole area

supporting_text: The PIC immediately blocked off the area with a portable metal stand to cover the open hole
Next, he used red flagging tape and steel cables to prevent entry to the area

controls.name: Emergency response and medical evacuation
controls.barrier_role: Minimize injury severity through rapid medical response

supporting_text: The mechanic was able to quickly pull himself up to safety
The mechanic reported to the PIC that he sustained an injury to his left upper rib area
The IP was sent in on a normal Cox helicopter to Grand Isle Shore Base
The IP was met by his company's representative for further medical evaluation at a medical facility

controls.name: Platform production shutdown
controls.barrier_role: Prevent further incidents by removing operational hazards

supporting_text: The barricaded area affected the operator's ability to safely operate process equipment. Therefore, the platform's production was shut in

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
